quotedTweet.content:
ABC: "You and every other Democrat oppose the SAVE America Act... requiring photo ID to register to vote, is this Democrats should get behind?"

WARNER: “In Virginia, we have voter ID and photo ID!”

twitter.content: Virginia does NOT have voter ID. you can print a fake utility bill with no photo and vote. You can cast a provisional ballot by signing an “attestation.” Virginia is a Mecca of voter fraud, particularly NoVA.
